errors.title: Setup is incomplete
errors.summary: The local CLI, SDK, runtime directory, or agent wiring is missing or not trusted.

nextAction.summary: Run verify with the exact handoff target, using --repair when verify says repair is available.

errors.title: Browser popup action required
errors.summary: Local setup is valid, but the WebExtension has not exposed an active runtime descriptor yet.

nextAction.summary: Open the open-browser-use pairing page, click Resume if enabled, then rerun verify.

errors.title: Native host is broken
errors.summary: The browser native-host manifest, wrapper, allowed origin, or host executable is missing or stale.

nextAction.summary: Repair the native host manifest and wrapper for the selected browser and extension.

errors.title: Extension id mismatch
errors.summary: The active browser descriptor or native-host manifest is bound to a different extension id.

nextAction.summary: Verify with the extension id copied from the popup handoff, then repair if verify requests it.

errors.title: No usable browser backend
errors.summary: No browser backend matching the requested browser, backend type, or socket path is available.

nextAction.summary: Run verify for readiness, then follow its single next action.

errors.title: Runtime descriptor is invalid
errors.summary: A browser runtime descriptor exists but its JSON, schema, type, socket path, or descriptor metadata is not valid.

nextAction.summary: Run repair to remove invalid descriptor entries safely, then reopen the popup so the extension publishes a fresh descriptor.

errors.title: Runtime descriptor is stale
errors.summary: A browser runtime descriptor exists but no longer points at a usable live backend.

nextAction.summary: Run browser doctor repair or reopen the popup so the extension publishes a fresh descriptor.

errors.title: Operation timed out
errors.summary: A defensive timeout elapsed before the host or browser operation returned.

nextAction.summary: Stop retrying blindly; report the timed-out operation and inspect browser_status or verify.

errors.title: Command was disallowed
errors.summary: A command guard rejected the requested browser operation.

nextAction.summary: Do not retry the same command until the guard reason is understood or policy is changed.

errors.title: Browser handle is missing
errors.summary: The requested tab, page, target, locator, or backend handle no longer exists or is not attached.

nextAction.summary: Refresh browser state, reacquire the handle, or stop if the user/browser closed it.

errors.title: Native dialog requires a decision
errors.summary: A confirm or prompt dialog was dismissed to avoid a hang and needs an explicit user or agent decision.

nextAction.summary: Stop the operation and report the dialog type, message summary, tab id, and dismissed default action.

errors.title: Transport closed
errors.summary: The native pipe, host process, or browser bridge closed before the request completed.

nextAction.summary: Check browser_status, then rerun verify if the backend is no longer available.
